home.title: JARINGOBE — Meal plans and groceries, automatically within budget
home.description: Auto-generate meal plans within your budget lock and bring food waste to zero with a virtual fridge. Start smarter grocery living with JARINGOBE.

login.title: Sign in — JARINGOBE
login.description: Get started in seconds with your Google or Kakao account.

settings.title: Settings — JARINGOBE
settings.description: Manage your account, eating profile, and auto-order store connections.

error.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

fridge.title: Virtual fridge
fridge.expiryBanner: Some ingredients are expiring soon. Use them first!

autoOrder.title: Auto grocery orders
autoOrder.descriptionActive: Your budget-fit grocery list is ready. Orders can be placed automatically at connected stores.
autoOrder.descriptionInactive: Create a budget plan and we'll prepare automatic orders that fit your budget.

prompt.title: Would you like to create a budget plan?

autoOrderPrompt.title: Ready to start auto ordering?
autoOrderPrompt.description: Get budget-fit groceries delivered automatically every week. Sign in to get started.

step1.title: How many people are eating together?

empty.title:
Create your meal plan,
right within budget
empty.description: AI prepares a week of meals and recipes that fit your household and budget.

budgetGate.title: Create a budget plan first
budgetGate.description: You need a budget plan before we can build meals that fit your budget.

create.title: Create my meal plan
create.daysTitle: How many days do you need?
create.errorTooLong: Please keep each item under 30 characters.
create.errorTooMany: You can add up to 10 items.
create.privacyNote: Allergy info is used only to generate this plan and is never stored.

overBudget.title: This plan is over budget
overBudget.description: Regenerate to fit your meals back within your budget.

regenerateConfirm.title: Regenerate the whole plan?
regenerateConfirm.description: Your current plan will be replaced with a new one.

locked.fridgeDescription: We're preparing a virtual fridge that auto-registers delivered ingredients.
locked.orderDescription: We're preparing budget-fit automatic grocery ordering.

setup.title: Finish setup to start your budget-fit meal plan

basicSteps.step1: Rinse and prep all the ingredients.

login.title: JARINGOBE
login.subtitle:
Eat well within budget,
waste nothing.
GO BE SMART, SAVE BIG.
login.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
login.retryHint: You can try again with the buttons below.

error.AUTH_PROVIDER_DENIED: Sign-in consent was cancelled. Please try again.
error.AUTH_INVALID_STATE: The sign-in request expired. Please try again.
error.AUTH_PROVIDER_ERROR: The sign-in provider had an issue. Please try again shortly.
error.AUTH_TOKEN_REVOKED: You were signed out for security. Please sign in again.
error.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please try again shortly.
error.BUDGET_PLAN_EXISTS: You already have a budget plan.
error.PROVIDER_NOT_SUPPORTED: This sign-in method is not supported yet.

notice.AUTH_EMAIL_CONFLICT_NOTICE: An account with this email already exists via another social provider. This sign-in created a separate account.

gate.title: Sign in to save your progress
gate.description: Sign in to check off meals, view full recipes, and unlock every feature.

imported.title: Your budget plan has been moved to your account!
imported.description: The plan you created in trial mode is now applied. Finish your household setup to start budget-fit meal planning.

step1.subtitle: From a solo home to a big family — add or remove members

step2.subtitle: Once locked, AI keeps plans & orders under this amount

frugal.title: Frugal & safe
frugal.desc: At or below the recommended budget

moderate.title: A balanced budget
moderate.desc: Slightly above recommended · room to save

roomy.title: A generous budget
roomy.desc: Well above recommended · watch for waste
